higgsfield.description: Higgsfield MCP — cinematic image and video generation. Models: Seedance 2.0, Soul 2.0, Veo 3.1, Kling 3.0, Sora 2, Nano Banana Pro, Flux 2, Seedream, GPT Image 2. Auth via OAuth on first connect.

meta-ads.description: Meta Ads MCP — campaign performance data, creative-level metrics, in-flight optimization.

google-drive.description: Google Drive MCP — client deliverable sync, asset handoff, reference ingestion.
